DASHBOARD.LOADING: Loading your study packs from database…
DASHBOARD.NO_PACKS_DESC: Create your first Study Pack to start organizing your notes, flashcards, and quizzes in one smart workspace.
DASHBOARD.IMPORT_MODAL_DESC: Paste JSON → saved directly to your database

PACK_DETAIL.REVISION_NOTES_DESC: Summarize topics, formulate concepts and review guides.
PACK_DETAIL.FLASHCARDS_DESC: Flip cards to revision. Spaced repetition system.
PACK_DETAIL.NO_FLASHCARDS_DESC: Create your study deck or import pre-made flashcards instantly using ChatGPT JSON export.
PACK_DETAIL.QCM_DESC: Generate tests and verify your weak topics.
PACK_DETAIL.NO_QCM_DESC: Create custom questions or import a JSON schema to enrich your quiz bank.
PACK_DETAIL.CHEATSHEETS_DESC: Keep key commands, syntax guides, and mappings.
PACK_DETAIL.NO_CHEATSHEETS_DESC: Store useful syntax, definitions, or custom quick-guides to review them easily.
PACK_DETAIL.EXERCISES_DESC: Practice writing query commands and code syntax.
PACK_DETAIL.NO_EXERCISES_DESC: Create sandbox exercises to practice query lines, index statements, or trigger logic inline.
PACK_DETAIL.NO_NOTES_DESC: Write summarize guides, paste notes, or use ChatGPT JSON quick imports to fill this pack.

FLASHCARDS.QUESTION: Question
FLASHCARDS.COMPLETED_MSG: You've completed all flashcards in this pack. Review them again later to strengthen your memory.

QCM.NO_QUESTIONS_DESC: Adjust your chapter or revision mode filters to display questions.
QCM.QUIZ_DONE_MSG: You scored {{score}}% in this session. Keep practicing!

FORM.TITLE: Title
FORM.TITLE_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Object Oriented Programming in Java
FORM.SUBJECT: Subject
FORM.DESC_PLACEHOLDER: Brief description of what this pack covers...

MODALS.NOTE_CONTENT_PH: Paste or write your structured review notes here...
MODALS.NOTE_PIN: Pin this note to top of library
MODALS.NOTE_IMPORT_DESC: Import your notes by pasting a valid JSON array. Follow the expected schema format:
MODALS.NOTE_IMPORT_PH: Paste your notes JSON array here...
MODALS.FLASH_BACK_PH: e.g. The ability of an object to take on many forms in OOP...
MODALS.FLASH_CODE_PH: e.g. SELECT * FROM Users WHERE ID = 1;
MODALS.FLASH_IMPORT_DESC: Import your card deck by pasting a JSON array. Optional: a 'code' field for syntax blocks:
MODALS.FLASH_IMPORT_PH: Paste your flashcards JSON array here...
MODALS.QCM_QUESTION_PH: e.g. Which of the following is NOT an OOP principle?
MODALS.QCM_EXPLANATION_PH: Explain why this answer is correct to help yourself review later...
MODALS.QCM_TRAP_PH: Highlight any typical traps or common exam tricks here...
MODALS.QCM_IMPORT_DESC: Import your quiz bank. Supports types 'multiple-choice', 'true-false', and 'fill-blanks':
MODALS.QCM_IMPORT_PH: Paste your quiz questions JSON array here...
MODALS.CS_ITEMS: References & Mappings (One line per mapping: "Term : Definition")
MODALS.CS_IMPORT_DESC: Import your reference sheets using a standard JSON schema (mapping items and optional code block):
MODALS.EX_DESC_PH: e.g. Practice writing SQL joins to fetch matching rows from Users and Orders tables.
MODALS.EX_SCHEMA_PH:
Table Users: id, name, email
Table Orders: id, user_id, product_name, price
MODALS.EX_TASK_PH: e.g. Write a query to fetch the name of user and product_name for all matches.
MODALS.EX_SOLUTION_PH:
SELECT u.name, o.product_name FROM Users u
INNER JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;
MODALS.EX_NOTE_PH: e.g. Make sure to specify the ON join condition mapping primary and foreign keys correctly.
MODALS.EX_IMPORT_DESC: Import your sandbox exercises using the expected JSON schema:

MAIN_DASHBOARD.TITLE: EduFocus
MAIN_DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: Premium Study Planner
MAIN_DASHBOARD.AI_DEFAULT_WELCOME:
👋 Hi! I am your AI Study Coach.

Click on "Analyze my day" to receive a personalized strategy based on your progress, subjects, and tasks.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.PLAN_TIP_1: Subjects with planned time: You can increase or decrease the target time.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.PLAN_TIP_2: Subjects without sessions: Click + to create sessions in the Calendar.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.PLAN_TIP_3: In the Calendar, create sessions by dragging on the desired schedule.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.TIMER_SESS_BEFORE_LONG_DESC: Number of focus sessions before a long break
MAIN_DASHBOARD.TIMER_DAILY_GOAL_QUESTION: How many Pomodoro sessions do you want to complete today?
MAIN_DASHBOARD.TIMER_RELAX_AUDIO_INFO: Enter a YouTube link. The audio will play in the background during relaxation breaks.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.TIMER_TECHNIQUE_DESC: Work in intervals of intense focus followed by short breaks. This method improves concentration and productivity!
MAIN_DASHBOARD.ALERT_NO_PLAN_MSG: You haven't set your study goals for the day yet. Take 1 minute to organize your subjects!
MAIN_DASHBOARD.ALERT_GOAL_MSG: Congratulations! You have completed 100% of your planned study time for today.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.ALERT_PROGRESS_MSG: You've passed the halfway mark of your goals for today. Keep it up!
MAIN_DASHBOARD.ALERT_URGENT_MSG: You have {{count}} urgent task(s) remaining. Prioritize them now!
MAIN_DASHBOARD.HERO_SUB: Optimize your focus, track your progress, and master your goals with our intelligent assistant.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.STEP1_DESC: Create the subjects you want to study to structure your planner.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.STEP2_DESC: Allocate a target study time for each subject today.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.STEP3_DESC: Select a subject and launch a Pomodoro session to accumulate your active study minutes!
MAIN_DASHBOARD.TODO_TIP_MSG: Add tasks with different priority levels to keep track of everything and clear your mind!
MAIN_DASHBOARD.TIMER_ADD_SUBJECT_FIRST: Add a subject first to start the timer.
MAIN_DASHBOARD.ADD_FIRST_SUBJECT: Create your first subject in the sidebar to start planning.
